name: tc-cov-below
description: The default coverage fixture shape — the prescribed consumer package layout `{package.json, src/**}`, scanned at `src/`. `src/grade.ts` has 100% lines but only ~66% branches, so it fails the mid floor on branches — the branch floor catching what line coverage misses. The flat, no-manifest shape is the named special case (exempt_cov, full_with_config).
